data.body:
## Description

**What**: Rewrite the onboarding skill's dialogue phases (Phase 1 auto-detection + Phase 2 Socratic dialogue) to auto-detect project configuration from files before asking, confirm detections rather than re-ask, and use open-ended questions with follow-ups instead of rigid multiple-choice menus.
**Why**: The current onboarding experience asks questions whose answers are already in project config files (package.json, .husky/pre-commit, CI workflows, etc.), making the process feel like form-filling rather than a knowledgeable colleague learning the project. Auto-detection feeds directly into output correctness — the more the skill detects, the more complete the generated config.
**Scope**:
- IN: Rewrite onboarding SKILL.md Phase 1 (auto-detection) and Phase 2 (Socratic dialogue); add config file reading for all detectable keys; define fallback behavior (prompt user → documented default → omit with comment); generate complete dso-config.conf with: dso.plugin_root (absolute path), format.*, test_gate.test_dirs, commands.validate, tickets.directory, checkpoint.marker_file, review.behavioral_patterns (semicolon-delimited globs); confirm CI workflow name by listing actual .github/workflows/*.yml filenames; ask about Jira bridge (project key only)
- OUT: Infrastructure initialization steps (Story b36f-cb7c); artifact review UX (Story a84a-c539); architect-foundation changes (Story 7ed8-deba)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, the onboarding skill reads project files (package.json, hook configs, CI workflows, test directories) and presents detected configuration for confirmation before asking questions
  ← Satisfies: "Both skills use Socratic dialogue — auto-detect project facts from config files before asking, confirm detections rather than re-ask"
- When this story is complete, the onboarding skill generates a dso-config.conf containing all derivable keys (dso.plugin_root as absolute path, format.*, test_gate.test_dirs, commands.validate, tickets.directory, checkpoint.marker_file, review.behavioral_patterns as semicolon-delimited globs) and merges with any existing dso-config.conf rather than overwriting
  ← Satisfies: "Onboarding produces complete, correct configuration"
- When this story is complete, CI workflow name is confirmed by listing actual workflow filenames, not inferred from provider name alone
  ← Satisfies: "Onboarding produces complete, correct configuration"
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Testing] SKILL.md is a prompt file — test via structural assertions (grep for required sections, auto-detection instructions, fallback behavior documentation)
- [Maintainability] Document the Socratic dialogue pattern once so architect-foundation (Story 7ed8-deba) can follow the same approach
- [Reliability] Config merge with existing dso-config.conf must handle duplicate keys and format-specific serialization (semicolon-delimited for review.behavioral_patterns)
